task_completion.description: A bookmark named 'DDG Onion Pivot' is created on the Bookmarks Toolbar.

task_completion.description: The bookmark's URL/Location is configured with the required javascript code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bookmark creation or editing dialog is open, showing the 'Location' or 'URL' field containing the exact javascript code starting with 'javascript:window.location.href='.

task_completion.description: The browser navigates to the target site 'https://check.torproject.org/'.

task_completion.description: The bookmarklet is executed, pivoting the current URL to a DuckDuckGo Onion search.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's address bar shows a URL starting with 'duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/?q=https%3A%2F%2Fcheck.torproject.org', demonstrating the bookmarklet successfully extracted and encoded the previous URL.

task_completion.description: The final DuckDuckGo Onion URL is saved to the specified report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor shows the file '/home/ga/Documents/pivot_workflow_report.txt' being created or edited, and it contains the final DuckDuckGo Onion URL generated by the bookmarklet.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical web browser to configure the bookmarklet and perform the navigation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a GUI web browser interface (e.g., Tor Browser or Firefox) being actively used, rather than relying solely on command-line tools like curl.

integrity.description: The agent executed the search by clicking the bookmarklet rather than manually typing the URL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transition to the DuckDuckGo search results happens after the agent is on check.torproject.org, without the agent manually typing the long URL-encoded search query into the address bar.

integrity.description: The agent saved the output to the actual file path requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal command (like echo ... > file) explicitly shows the file being written to '/home/ga/Documents/pivot_workflow_report.txt', rather than just displaying it on screen.
